posts.text:
Trump DECLARES: MAGA is Neocon Mark Levin, and No Criticism is Allowed

piped.video/watch?v=d38Ba4Xi…
While Trump was chatting on the phone to Laura Loomer to hear what a great and courageous war hero he is, and as he was issuing long screeds in defense of Mark Levin for Truth Social....

I have an earnest question for my friends in MAGA (now defined by Trump to mean: those who agree with whatever views myself and Mark Levin are expressing).

Here was Trump's vicious, accurate critique of Liz Cheney last year. How does it not apply at least equally to Mark Levin?

Video

It's completely pathetic for a President at war -- with soldiers from other people's families under his command who are dying -- to write long social media screeds arbitrating various bickering matches between pundits.

It's far more pathetic still that, in doing so, he decreed that being in MAGA requires that you don't and can't criticize a neocon Israel First Fox News warmongering chickenhawk pig like Mark Levin. What kind of serious or dignified political movement has rules like that decreed,

The supposedly "most left-wing" Gen Z Congressional candidate -- @KatAbughazaleh -- has the foreign policy of Hillary Clinton, John Kerry, and Liz Cheney.

There are many explanations for this, but a key one is that Trump-era "left-wing foreign policy" -- which barely exists any more as an identifiable dogma -- got defined by Russiagate, Maddow, NeverTrump Bush/Cheney operatives (David Frum, Nicolle Wallace, Bill Kristol, The Atlantic), Ukraine, and an alliance with and admiration for the US Sec

It's obviously one of the most pathetic things ever seen that Mark Levin was so upset by Megyn Kelly's mockery of him (after months of calling her Nazi, etc) that he run to Trump to beg for a tweet in defense.

But far more pathetic is that Trump -- in the middle of a war he started where American soldiers are fighting and dying (none in his family of course) -- he found the time not just to do it, but to write a long screed about Mark Levin's greatness, as if he were Nentayhau or someone whom T

Trump has been saying for a full year now that "MAGA" means only one thing.

It does not indicate any fixed principles in foreign policy or economic policy.

It requires ONLY loyalty to Trump and whatever he says, even if it's the opposite of what he said yesterday.

Today Trump added a second MAGA commandment: one must revere, and never criticize, Fox News' Supreme Israel Firster Mark Levin. That's the whole movement. 

That's why MTG has been saying there's a fundamental differerence between M

It's been obvious for months now that the second Trump term serves Netanyhau, Palantir, Jared Kushner, Ben Shapiro, Lindsey Graham, corporatist power, K street sleaze and Mark Levin. 

Meaning: the second Trump term is fully shaped by the exact factions Trump vowed to vanquish.


Karoline Leavitt (@PressSec)

Ben Shapiro praises Trump’s Iran strikes as ‘single bravest foreign policy move of my lifetime’

foxnews.com/media/ben-shapir…




— https://nitter.net/PressSec/status/2033535090018447506#m
